market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the unique charm of The Octagon in this stylish 1-bedroom apartment, perfect for 4 guests. Our home is just a short walk from the local amenities and offers a relaxing retreat after a day of exploring. The apartment is equipped with a comfortable double bed and a sofa bed, ideal for friends or family. The kitchen is fully stocked with everything you need to cook your favorite meals. With its stylish decor and comfortable layout, this apartment is the perfect choice for your home away from home.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor spaces for guests to relax and enjoy the surroundings
Parking and facilities for added convenience
Entertainment options such as a TV or streaming device
analysis.photo_order_rec: Show the living area as the cover photo, highlighting the stylish decor and comfortable sofa bed.
key_diagnosis: Their nightly rate (£151.8) is -13% vs the cohort median (£175.00), indicating a significant opportunity to price competitively and increase bookings.
With an occupancy rate of 15.2% and 76 open nights, there is a huge room to improve occupancy, which is 52.1% lower than the cohort median occupancy of 28.3%.

The lack of amenities such as Outdoor spaces for guests to relax and enjoy the surroundings, Parking and facilities for added convenience, and Entertainment options such as a TV or streaming device could be the reason for the low occupancy and may be easily addressed by adding the necessary amenities.
analysis.outreach_hook: By adding some outdoor spaces, parking and facilities, and entertainment options, you can increase your daily earnings by £24.60 (based on 76 open nights).
